analysis.name: Euler
analysis.summary: Euler是一个模块化DeFi借贷协议，近期因Upbit上线和币安HODLer空投等利好催化，价格短期上涨。但基本面仍受此前黑客事件影响，且当前价格较ATH跌幅超93%，估值偏低但风险较高。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破1.0美元支撑位或出现新的安全漏洞，则逻辑失效。

catalysts: Upbit上线EUL交易对，带来韩国市场流动性
币安HODLer空投活动，增加持有需求
Euler v2模块化借贷协议上线，经过31次审计，安全性提升
Coinbase Ventures和Paradigm等顶级机构投资背景

latestNews.title: Upbit Listings: Exciting New Tokens Euler (EUL) and Plume (PLUME) Arrive! - Binance
latestNews.reason: Upbit作为韩国头部交易所，上线EUL将带来大量新增买盘和流动性。

latestNews.title: Introducing Euler (EUL) on Binance HODLer Airdrops! Earn EUL With Retroactive BNB Simple Earn Subscriptions - Binance
latestNews.reason: 币安HODLer空投活动激励用户持有EUL，减少流通供应，短期利好价格。

latestNews.title: Euler returns to launch v2 modular DeFi lending protocol following 31 audits post-$197 million hack - The Block
latestNews.reason: v2版本经过多次审计，修复了此前黑客漏洞，恢复社区信心。

fundamentals: Euler是去中心化借贷协议，支持长尾资产借贷，v2版本采用模块化设计。
获得Paradigm、Coinbase Ventures等顶级机构投资，融资3200万美元。
2023年曾遭黑客攻击损失1.97亿美元，后追回大部分资金并重启。
当前流通市值约2400万美元，FDV约2700万美元，估值较低。
代币总供应量2718万枚，已全部流通，无解锁抛压。
marketRead: 24小时涨幅85%，成交量225万美元，流动性约2000万美元（Uniswap池）。
价格从ATH 15.81美元下跌超93%，当前1.0美元附近，处于历史低位。
近期受Upbit上线消息刺激，价格快速拉升，但成交量相对市值仍偏低。
7日跌幅3.7%，30日跌幅15.7%，长期趋势仍偏弱。
risks: 历史黑客事件阴影未完全消除，市场对安全性仍有顾虑。
DeFi赛道竞争激烈，Aave、Compound等龙头占据主导地位。
当前上涨主要依赖交易所上线等短期催化，持续性存疑。
流动性集中在Uniswap，深度一般，大额交易可能滑点较高。
代币价格长期低迷，市场情绪偏弱。
watchlist: Upbit上线后交易量变化及韩国市场反应
币安HODLer空投活动进展及代币解锁情况
是否有新的安全审计报告或漏洞披露
sourceNotes: 价格数据来自DexScreener，存在延迟可能。
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分标题可能不完整。
基本面信息来自CoinMarketCap和公开报道，未独立验证。

profile.name: Euler
profile.description: The ability to lend and borrow assets efficiently is a crucial feature of any financial system. In the world of traditional finance, this process is typically facilitated by trusted and permissioned third-parties such as banks, who connect people with a surplus of money to those who need access to it in the short term. In the world of decentralised finance (DeFi), trusted and permissioned third-parties are no longer needed; banks have been replaced by trustless and permissionless lending protocols running on the blockchain (1). Among the first-generation of DeFi lending protocols are Compound (2) and Aave (3). These protocols provide users with access to lending and borrowing capabilities for a handful of the most liquid ERC20 tokens. However, these protocols were not designed to handle the risks associated with lending and borrowing illiquid or volatile assets and have therefore relied on a permissioned listing system to protect their users from the risks associated with such assets. Consequently, there remains significant unmet demand for lending and borrowing the long tail of crypto assets. On the lending side, users want to deposit tokens to earn yield and take leveraged long p
